subject: Spiritomb, a swirling dark orb of bound spirits anchored to a cracked stone keystone, glowing green with ghostly faces visible in the vortex
description: Spiritomb manifests as a dense swirling vortex of dark energy — green-glowing, smoke-like tendrils spiral outward from a central mass that is anchored to a cracked gray stone or keystone at the bottom of the composition. Within the dark swirl, faint ghostly face-shapes and spiraling patterns are visible. The background is very dark, nearly void-black, with the green glow from Spiritomb providing the primary light source, giving the card an eerie, chiaroscuro quality. The stone anchor at the base grounds the otherwise formless entity.
foreground: Spiritomb's swirling dark-energy vortex with green glow and ghost-face patterns
background: Near-void darkness with faint green ambient glow
